3167800.name: Therapy
3167800.description:
This game is a fascinating adventure, where players rapidly advance in a whimsical world.
Clouds jump over penguin poles sprouting from the ground and sky, continuing to fly forward.
The clouds will drift further away, presenting a new scene full of vibrant colors and surprises.
Soft visual effects immerse players in a peaceful and dreamlike atmosphere.
Game operation mode
Left mouse button - Jump
What do you need to do
You need to control the character. Constantly jumping. Avoid the upcoming obstacles. (You need to jump higher than the obstacle)
You have three chances to make mistakes!
